data.title: Empire State Building debuts 'KPOP DEMON HUNTERS' music-to-light show with Netflix, CAPE USA, iHeartMedia. Stars visit.
data.description: In New York, the Empire State Building debuted a Music-to-Light Spectacular for the start of “KPOP DEMON HUNTERS” Golden Weekend on Aug. 22. The event was in collaboration with Netflix and the Coalition of Asian Pacifics in Entertainment (CAPE), and also had support from iHeartMedia. Stars of the film, Arden Cho, May Hong, and singer REI AMI, participated in a special tower lighting ceremony earlier in the day. They flipped the iconic light switch at the Empire State Building.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $111,000, XRP falls under $3 as Ethereum hits new ATH at $4,588.97. 166,734 traders liquidated, losing $839.78M. $23.2M outflows and $341.2M inflows in spot ETFs. Trading lower despite macro jitters.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a decrease in trading on Monday, despite Ethereum hitting a new all-time high on Sunday. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $111,217.31, Ethereum at $4,588.97, Solana at $196.37, XRP at $2.93, Dogecoin at $0.2189, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001238. Coinglass data revealed that 166,734 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses amounting to $839.78 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $23.2 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs, while spot Ethereum ETFs saw net inflows of $341.2 million. Altcoin Sherpa highlighted Bitcoin's struggle to maintain its range and cautioned that a breakdown of the range low could lead to exiting all trades. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
INDIAN AMBASSADOR: WILL CONTINUE BUYING RUSSIAN OIL

data.title: Dow falls before Nvidia earnings and inflation data; Palantir stock declines. Live coverage on Investors Business Daily.
data.description: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline as investors awaited Nvidia's earnings report and important inflation figures. Shares of Palantir also saw a drop in value. This recent market update showcases the Dow's decrease prior to significant events, indicating a level of caution among traders. The situation highlights the impact of company reports and economic data on stock performance.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop after Powell-led rally, with S&P 500 and Dow Jones hitting new highs. Nvidia earnings awaited.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Powell's optimistic remarks on Friday led to a significant market surge, resulting in record highs for both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones indices. Multiple stocks showed indications for investors to buy. The focus now shifts to Nvidia's upcoming earnings report as the next important market event following Powell's speech. Dow Jones Futures dropped post-rally, setting the stage for Nvidia to become the next significant market indicator.
Decision on next Fed chairman likely to take months, White House's Hassett says

data.title: Argenx's Vyvgart trial success leads to FDA label expansion; Phase 3 trial showed significant improvement in MG patients.
data.description: Argenx SE shared new findings from the Phase 3 ADAPT SERON study of Vyvgart (IV: efgartigimod alfa-fcab) on Monday. The study involved participants who were randomized 1:1 in Part A to receive either 4 weekly infusions of efgartigimod IV or a placebo. This was followed by a 5-week follow-up period for primary analysis. In Part B, an open-label extension, participants were given 2 fixed cycles of 4 weekly efgartigimod infusions with a 4-week interval between cycles. Starting from cycle 3, additional cycles could be initiated at least 1 week after the previous cycle, based on clinical assessment. The study successfully met its primary goal, showing that AChR-Ab seronegative gMG patients treated with Vyvgart saw a statistically significant and clinically meaningful enhancement in MG-ADL. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
White House's Hassett says U.S. could take stakes in other industries

data.title: Qatar construction equipment market report 2025-2030 predicts growth from 4,039 to 5,032 units, led by Caterpillar, Komatsu, Liebherr, Volvo CE, Hitachi, and HD Hyundai.
data.description: A report on the Qatar Construction Equipment Market has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com offerings. In 2024, the market was estimated to be at 4,039 Units, with a projected growth to reach 5,032 Units by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.73%. Leading companies in this market include Caterpillar, Komatsu, Liebherr, Volvo CE, Hitachi Construction Machinery, and HD Hyundai Construction Equipment.
Turkey calls Israel's strike on Gaza hospital 'attack on press freedom'

data.title: Empery Digital updates on share buyback program; repurchased 363,395 shares at $7.39 each, totaling $100 million.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Empery Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: EMPD) provided an update on its approved share repurchase plan. As of August 22, 2025, the company bought back 363,395 shares of its common stock out of the $100 million share repurchase program. The average purchase price per share was $7.39, inclusive of all fees and commissions. This transaction was funded using cash from the company's balance sheet. The repurchased shares represent the maximum allowed under the program.

data.title: Senvest Capital Inc. (TSX: SEC) approved for normal course issuer bid purchasing up to 100,000 shares (approx. 4.12% of outstanding) starting Aug 27, 2025. Bid ends by Aug 26, 2026.
data.description: Senvest Capital Inc. (TSX: SEC) based in Montreal, announced today that the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has approved the Corporation's plan to initiate a normal course issuer bid (NCIB). Under this bid, the Corporation intends to buy back up to 100,000 of its common shares, translating to roughly 4.12% of the total 2,430,024 common shares outstanding as of August 13, 2025. These purchases will occur on the TSX, other specified exchanges, Canadian trading systems, or through other approved methods, as per regulatory guidelines. Given the historically low trading volumes of its common shares on the TSX, the actual repurchased amount may be lower than 100,000 shares. The buyback program is scheduled to start on August 27, 2025, and will end when all the buyback transactions are done or by August 26, 2026.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp. raising $125M in equity for Solana growth, closing on Aug. 28 at $12.50 per share.
data.description: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV), based in Boca Raton, FL, revealed their groundbreaking treasury strategy geared towards accruing and compounding Solana ("SOL"). The company, renowned as the maiden US public entity with such a strategy, disclosed securing definitive agreements for a $125 million equity offering, each share priced at $12.50. The completion of this transaction is anticipated on Thursday, August 28, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing terms.

data.title: Skyline Builders Group Holding Ltd (NASDAQ: SKBL) to seek shareholder approval for share consolidation.
data.description: On August 24, 2025, Skyline Builders Group Holding Limited in Hong Kong, a civil engineering services provider, revealed a decision by its Board of Directors to consolidate the company's authorized, issued, and outstanding shares. This move, known as a "Share Consolidation," is set to be proposed for approval at an upcoming extraordinary general meeting. Skyline Builders Group Holding Limited is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SKBL.

data.title: QT Imaging has partnered with Gulf Medical for exclusive distribution in Saudi Arabia for their FDA-cleared QTI Breast Acoustic CT scanner.
data.description: In Novato, California, QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. (QTI) has signed an exclusive distribution agreement with Gulf Medical Co. (GMC) in Saudi Arabia for their innovative body imaging systems. The agreement covers the territory of Saudi Arabia. QTI, a medical device company, traded on OTCQB as QTIH, focuses on research, development, and commercialization. The deal involves the U.S. FDA-cleared QTI Breast Acoustic CT™ scanner, which is a groundbreaking non-invasive technology for breast imaging.

data.title: Heritage Distilling reduces debt by $19.3M and adds $320M in $IP tokens after completing $223.8M private placement.
data.description: In Gig Harbor, Washington, Heritage Distilling has successfully concluded a private placement, raising $223.8 million. This move has led to a significant reduction in debt by $19.3 million. Additionally, the company has bolstered its treasury with over $320 million in intellectual property.
